page: Google Cloud Platform m4-hypermem-32 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the memory-optimized m4 family. It features 32 dedicated virtual CPUs and 496.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of 15.5 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, and it is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The hardware profile of the m4-hypermem-32 is designed for memory-intensive workloads where RAM capacity is the primary bottleneck rather than local storage speed or parallel GPU processing. Because it lacks local NVMe SSDs and integrated graphics accelerators, the instance offers a specialized allocation of resources, maximizing memory capacity per vCPU. This resource density provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets without the overhead of unused hardware accelerators or local storage volumes.

This server configuration is suited for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data analytics pipelines. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance, which is critical for maintaining predictable latency in high-throughput database operations and complex memory-resident calculations.
description: Google Cloud Platform m4-hypermem-32 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance configured with 32 dedicated vCPUs and 496.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 15.5 GB per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, focusing its resource allocation entirely on memory capacity and dedicated compute performance. This specialized profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require massive in-memory datasets but do not need local NVMe storage or hardware acceleration. It is designed for workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-bound data processing pipelines where consistent CPU performance and high RAM capacity are critical.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform m4-hypermem-32 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs and 496 GB of RAM, designed for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring high RAM-to-CPU density and dedicated processing cores for demanding in-memory enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 496.0 GB of system memory providing 15.5 GB per core
Zero bundled GPUs and no local storage allocation
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and ERP systems
Designed for memory-bound data analytics pipelines
